allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); attrs=set\(\); [attrs.add\(a['key']\) for b in d.get\('batches',[]\) for ss in b.get\('scopeSpans',[]\) for sp in ss.get\('spans',[]\) for a in sp.get\('attributes',[]\)]; print\('span attr keys:', sorted\(attrs\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(' ',x['name'],x['type'],'uid='+x['uid']\) for x in d]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(' ',x['title'],'-> uid',x['uid']\) for x in d]")
Bash(timeout 300 sh -c 'docker save showcase-app:latest | docker exec -i swarm-node docker load')
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); r=d['data']['result']; print\('status classes:', {m['metric'].get\('status'\): m['value'][1] for m in r} if r else 'NO DATA'\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); rs=d.get\('data',{}\).get\('result',[]\); print\('log streams:',len\(rs\)\); [print\(' ',v[1][:100]\) for s in rs[:1] for v in s['values'][:2]]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); t=d.get\('traces',[]\); print\('traces found:',len\(t\)\); [print\(' ',x.get\('rootServiceName'\),x.get\('rootTraceName'\)\) for x in t]")
